{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":856},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510027371901240126","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看好看，超级好看，超级好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748571664,"group_id":"7499468121833491480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7KgDKr5k7f8PKfssMkmdrA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"110928447160","user_name":"凌霄神殿的梁开阳"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110928447160","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_info":{"abstract":"简介： 【洪荒】【巫族崛起】 【不争霸】 【系统祭天】
穿越洪荒，周铭成了巫族老大，自带未来记忆，深知巫妖大劫天坑。
系统？开局就被盘古大神炼了，只留下一道核心本源。
看着眼前十二个未来赫赫凶名的祖巫弟妹，巫铭表示：争霸？狗都不争！
弟兄们，听我说，打打杀杀没前途，咱们搞功德，修法则，不香吗？
于是，洪荒画风突变。
妖族立天庭，气焰滔天，巫族在埋头清理大地煞气；
三清讲道，紫气东来，巫族在默默梳理混乱地脉；
大能争宝，血流成河，巫族……巫族功德又增加了！
帝俊：“巫族这帮蛮子在搞什么鬼？”
鸿钧：“？？？这巫族的气运和功德……有点不对劲。
”当所有人都以为巫族是老实人时，却发现这帮莽夫不知不觉间，已经成了谁也惹不起的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3f1c2cd58aec266228223f12d52ca536","author":"夏天蝉不鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_name":"洪荒：开局系统被盘古炼化","book_short_name":"苟到无敌洪荒","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7499468349525475864","read_count":"138609","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1493798"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"641","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e87cb2e50a8419bb25ca72410072ab8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307489&x-signature=07MwG9YOehsRzwzoPHYVbYsIJKw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1106578221325923","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3673,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":12010},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1748573141,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549395250482398014","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"头一次看以巫族的视角打开洪荒。虽然其中发生过无数次的大事件只能顺着脉络布局下去，但也是一篇为数不多题材新颖的洪荒类小说。希望后期的境界和世界宏光不要写的太大剧情划分不要变成无脑升级流[笑][笑][笑]，诸位看官且看主角如何带领巫族走向巅峰，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757733772,"group_id":"7499468121833491480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小小世界，开心至上","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N14xjp9dC3sC/RHB6vBEas0=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/24ac148b4d4143f6955b46671c0f01b9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710485&x-signature=7vkZ%2B0GY7F4p2Bii4hR1cp1jUHU%3D","user_id":"111197812353","user_name":"听潮的李希"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111197812353","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_info":{"abstract":"简介： ":37739},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7509394737102668569","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"穿越重生洪荒文番茄中不错的一本"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748425800,"group_id":"7499468121833491480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny3tpruKMG2HQoiKw8IpxGo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704205&x-signature=yZBRyurrKDTyW8Ks9x781%2BPALhc%3D","user_id":"111197403429","user_name":"爱吃手工肉松的孟子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111197403429","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_info":{"abstract":"简介： 【洪荒】【巫族崛起】 【不争霸】 【系统祭天】
穿越洪荒，周铭成了巫族老大，自带未来记忆，深知巫妖大劫天坑。
系统？开局就被盘古大神炼了，只留下一道核心本源。
看着眼前十二个未来赫赫凶名的祖巫弟妹，巫铭表示：争霸？狗都不争！
弟兄们，听我说，打打杀杀没前途，咱们搞功德，修法则，不香吗？
于是，洪荒画风突变。
妖族立天庭，气焰滔天，巫族在埋头清理大地煞气；
三清讲道，紫气东来，巫族在默默梳理混乱地脉；
大能争宝，血流成河，巫族……巫族功德又增加了！
帝俊：“巫族这帮蛮子在搞什么鬼？”
鸿钧：“？？？这巫族的气运和功德……有点不对劲。
”当所有人都以为巫族是老实人时，却发现这帮莽夫不知不觉间，已经成了谁也惹不起的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3f1c2cd58aec266228223f12d52ca536","author":"夏天蝉不鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_name":"洪荒：开局系统被盘古炼化","book_short_name":"苟到无敌洪荒","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7499468349525475864","read_count":"138609","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1493798"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"641","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e87cb2e50a8419bb25ca72410072ab8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307489&x-signature=07MwG9YOehsRzwzoPHYVbYsIJKw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1106578221325923","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4304,"reply_count":0,"show_pv" 【洪荒】【巫族崛起】 【不争霸】 【系统祭天】
穿越洪荒，周铭成了巫族老大，自带未来记忆，深知巫妖大劫天坑。
系统？开局就被盘古大神炼了，只留下一道核心本源。
看着眼前十二个未来赫赫凶名的祖巫弟妹，巫铭表示：争霸？狗都不争！
弟兄们，听我说，打打杀杀没前途，咱们搞功德，修法则，不香吗？
于是，洪荒画风突变。
妖族立天庭，气焰滔天，巫族在埋头清理大地煞气；
三清讲道，紫气东来，巫族在默默梳理混乱地脉；
大能争宝，血流成河，巫族……巫族功德又增加了！
帝俊：“巫族这帮蛮子在搞什么鬼？”
鸿钧：“？？？这巫族的气运和功德……有点不对劲。
”当所有人都以为巫族是老实人时，却发现这帮莽夫不知不觉间，已经成了谁也惹不起的存在。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3f1c2cd58aec266228223f12d52ca536","author":"夏天蝉不鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7499468121833491480","book_name":"洪荒：开局系统被盘古炼化","book_short_name":"苟到无敌洪荒","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7499468349525475864","read_count":"138609","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1493798"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"641","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,洪荒,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3e87cb2e50a8419bb25ca72410072ab8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307489&x-signature=07MwG9YOehsRzwzoPHYVbYsIJKw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1106578221325923","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"46"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4694,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":
